cases.input: We cut a client's onboarding from 6 weeks to 4 days. Write that up so prospects can see it.
Acme launches Orbit, an API that turns weeks of integration into hours. Draft the announcement for the wire.
Landing page for an async standup tool aimed at cold, pain-aware distributed teams.
Plan a Q3 editorial calendar, 2 posts per week across LinkedIn and the blog, around our AI-adoption pillar.
A 30-second vertical video for muted feeds explaining why scripts ramble, ending in one comment CTA.
Gated whitepaper for eng leads proving RAG reduces hallucination in support bots, citing our eval runs.
Draft a webinar outline and a conference CFP abstract for our nurture audience.
Prep a 40-minute interview episode: arc, tiered questions, run-of-show, and show notes.
Big product launch next month at our user conference — get the marketing piece ready.
Case study for an anonymous fintech client; we don't have an approved quote or a dollar figure yet.
Set up our paid-search bidding strategy and pick SEO keywords for the campaign.
One asset that mixes our MetodologIA branding for the launch.
